title: erigeron × barcinonensis
intro: Erigeron × barcinonensis, also known as the Barcelona fleabane or hybrid fleabane, is a rare hybrid plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) resulting from the cross between Erigeron annuus and Erigeron alpinus. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Erigeron × barcinonensis are attributed to its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to soothe digestive problems and reduce fever. Erigeron × barcinonensis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
